caption: The video appears to be an educational or informational segment discussing the importance of adhering to licensing agreements when distributing copyrighted materials. The slide shown in the video emphasizes that the right to distribute such materials is granted solely through a license. It warns that violating this license results in losing the right to distribute, and further explains that unauthorized distribution constitutes copyright infringement. This suggests that the video aims to educate viewers on the legal implications of not following licensing terms, likely targeting individuals or organizations involved in content creation, distribution, or management. The static nature of the frames indicates that the focus is on the text, possibly accompanied by a voiceover or additional visual aids to reinforce the message.
